ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot making a gesture that resembles writing or drawing the number 9.  The robot will use its right arm to mimic the motion of drawing a loop and a line. The left arm will remain mostly still, providing a contrast that emphasizes the right arm's movement.  The animation focuses on the key aspects of the action, not the fine details. In the first frame, both arms are at rest, providing a baseline. The second frame shows the right arm beginning to draw the loop of the 9. The third frame depicts the right arm completing the loop and starting to move downward to draw the line. The fourth frame shows the right arm finishing the line, completing the 9. Finally, in the fifth frame, both arms return to a resting position.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to draw
right arm begins to loop the top of the nine
the loop completes, starting the downward stroke
the line finishes, completing the number nine
both arms return to rest, the drawing is done
